text: Claude Cowork's sandboxed VM can't reach your host shell. cowork-terminal-mcp v0.4.1 bridges it with one MCP tool, stdio only, and Git Bash hard-pinned by absolute path on Windows -- because System32\bash.exe is WSL, and WSL can't run dotnet.exe.
Stdout is for MCP traffic, not logs. The one Program.cs line that keeps a C# MCP server on .NET 11 alive.
SearchValues<T> built once is 250x faster than IndexOfAny. Built per call, it's slower. The static readonly rule, in .NET 11.
